title: Cobblemon: Neon Violet/Seraphic Gold
description: Welcome to the region of Tokyo-2. After the destruction of Tokyo-1 the region fell into ruins due to the Pokémon legendries classified as Angels. Do you have what it takes to explore a ruined and dangerous new world.
body:
This is a Cobblemon Add-on that aims to add Neon Genesis Evangelion creatures to Cobblemon in a completely catchable format. This was inspired by OceanMan's Godzilla Add-on. This is compatable with both 1.6.0 and 1.6.1 and will NOT be downgraded, so if you want to play on a early version with this you will have to downgrade it yourself.
Included Angels are:
Ramiel,
Sahaquiel,
Leliel,
and may or may-not have a little secret Mythical Angel.

Starters:
Ramiel (Starter Form),
Sahaquiel (Starter Form),
Leliel (Starter From)

Regional Forms:
Piplup (PenPen),
Wooper (Emotional Form),
Dugtrio (Angel Corruption)

Upcomming Angels:
Sachiel,
Israfel,
and Ireul...
